TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kikay nu balunga ś©üŚčēŤąĻ == kikay a balunga u itida i kikul ku sanga idaw ku kulupila malineng a ahemaway nu balungaan, amelik ku culil, satalakaway nu amelik han makaala tu 30 hay-li ka talakaw. 33 ś©üŚčēŤąĻ . sakay niubiayan ŤĶįÁßĀÁĒ®ťÄĒ kikay a balungaan u sakay kalawkawan a amelikan, sisa hina cukaymas ku la'cusay a tademawan sapiubi nu heni a kawawan, alahican i nikudan nu kikulan micunus tu sepat lima a muota sakakalamkan nu culil, alahican mikiyadah tu walu a muotaan, mahiniay ni sumadan a kikay nu balungaan pangangan han ci " ta-fey. tusepsepsep ayaw a mihcaan, micidek i caysiwsiwsep lingatu nu mihcaan, saculil nu miubiay a balungaan hinaculil i Cun-kuo talu atu Sing-kun a liwliw micidek ku yadah. miubiay a tademaw sipakayda i kikayay a balungaan, muculil tina tusaay a kitidaan pitu a saselican nu tukian. tada tabakitu ku muota, amica ku nikaameli sawsawni siziku tu, sisa, amica kaw u miubiay a cacay, hucunu tademaw caay kacaw tina kikayan a balungaan. Micapitu ayda a mihcaan, tada malaluktu ku mikinsaay sisa maselep ku miubiay pakay balungaan, nika mahiniay a balungaan katukuh ayda u labuay nu Sing-kang a tademaw ku micukaymasay tu niubian, alahican u miubiay a tahekal nu tademaw micukaymas ci "ta-feyan", namapulung tu a mapalalid nu imelang. . kikayay a balunga ś©üŚčēŤąĻ kikayay a balunga , maaymas atu nu sakay tademaway a balunga, u kikay ku mitiyungay a balungaan. pangangan han u " meduk sananay a balunga". miidaay tu kikayay nu muculilay a balungaan. kenihan u silahuday a balungaan, sumi a simal nu balungaan, kadidengay a balungaan, sumi nu kadidengay a balungaan, sakay dingkiay cuduhan a balungaan, mipesay nu cacuduhan a balungaan, he-tun-li balungaan. u simal atu pacaiten nanay nu adidiay a balungaan, hina panganganan u " utubayay a balungaan". ś©üŚčēŤąĻ , . imi ŚģöÁĺ© caysiwpiclu mihcaan kanatal i bayu nu sakacaay ka lalikeluh nu kawawan" sakatulu " hucunu imi" sakatusa nu ahebalay nu dadanan: kikayay nu balungaan" a kamuan, u kikay ku micuduhan tu duma a balungaan. sipakayni i " kikayay a balungaan" tunipikaysyakuan, idaw ku sasakamuen tu i sasaay: "1972 : (1) " u kikay ku sapicuduh" ya balungan hina u kikay ku sapicuduh sa. anu idaw ku nipipacumudan tu sapicuduh tu kikayan atu taneng u kikay ku sapicuduh, nika hatidaay tu caay namin kaw u kikay ku micuduhan, hakiya u caayay pacumud tu kikay, caay kaw nu " kikayay a balungan". hatu hatidaay nu nipacunaan tu balungaan, anu pacumuden tu kikay anu caay cukaymasi u "sasilud tu" " hucunu imian" saan tu " payaypay a balungan" u caayay kaw u kikayay a balungaan, caay kaw u kikayay nu balungaan. kanahatu papacunaan tu payapay nu balungaan u kikay ku sapicuduh a kikayan, caay kaw maaymasay tu " sasiludan" mahiniay u " payapay nu balungaan" a imian, taneng kita palutatengan u hinacuduhan nanay tada u kikay tu ku sapicuduh, sisa u " kikayay nu balungaan". (1) . (2) " kikay ku sapicuduh" nipatucekan u kikay ku sapicuduh sa, anu u canancanan tu a kikayan. anu u cacuduhen tu a waywayan u kikay tu ku sapicuduh, anu u lahud tu a balunaan, sumi nu kikayan a balungaan, dinki cacuduhan atu he-tun-li a balungaan, u "kikayay namin nu balungaan" ku sausi sa. (2) . (3) " u kikay ku sapicuduh" caay kaw tatengaay u kikay ku sapicuduh. anu u kikaytu ku sapicuduh a waywayan u kikaytu ku sapicuduh sa, kanahatu musaluimeng i minatu ku balunga atu masaluimeng ku kikay i nipiculilan, u " kikay nu balungaan" namin. (3) . (4) " siludan" sakatulu " hucunu a imian" sipatatiku tu " mibutingay a balungaan, " caayay kaw kakakuwanan a balunga", sasanalimaan a sakasiwantan nu balungaan, " ti-siw-balunga, " nanumay a hikuki' nu imian, mahiniay a balunga u kikayan nanay a pacuduhan caay kaw u "kikay nu balungaan, itini i kanatalan nu sulitan nu "hucunu a imian" kaysakuan u masacacayay atu masilacay, " u ainanumay a balungan sa" tatengan u " kikayay nu balungaan", tatengaay nu imian u " kikay nu balungaan". (4)"Ť¶ŹŚČá" . tasaay nu kikay a balungan ŚÖ©ŤČėś©üŚčēŤąĻ sakay "sasiludan" saka sabaw sepat a selic, sabaw pitu a selic, sabaw walu a selic, sabaw siwa a selic a nipatucekan, uyni a selican "tasaay nu kikkay a balungaan" caay kaw nida nu kikayay a balungaan atu nu duma a balungaan " sapitupin tu labang nu balungaan, yu misanga henay tina balungaan, patucekan tu sakay bayuay a balungaan, misasediway nu balungaan. kanahatu u kikayay a balungaan atu duma nu sepatay a babalungaan ni sanga " masasuadih nu papacunaan" a waywayan, caay kaw maaymasay " sasiludan" sakacacay a bataan nu imian " sakalalikelah nu papacunaan" a sakatatungus : sakalecad, uyni a nipatucekan caay kaaymas tina sepatay nu balungaan a "nika lalikeluhan" nu waywayan. ś†Ļśďö"Ť¶ŹŚČá" . dadan nu balungaan nikalalikeluhan nina tusaay a balungaan miduducay tu nikalalikeluhan ninatusaay a balungaan, u nipiduducan tu culil a makaypabaw atu makay sasa a balunga hakiya micacuis tu balunga atu miduducay tu nanum a balunga nina tusaay a babalungaan tu nikalikeluhan. pasu i sasaay a kamuen (1) sikalalikeluh atu micapiaytu a nikalalikeluh hicaen a siwatan tina tusaay a balungaan tu nikalalikeluhan atu micapiay tu a nikalalikeluhan. i labii, hucunu cacayay a balungaan i nu ayawan atu micapiay tu i nu ayawan, maadih ku nu ayawan atu nikudanay a dikian masapatelekay a sulidan atu micapiay tu a mapatelekay a sulitan, malecad makaadih tu sumanahay , langdaway a dingkian, ya tanayu misaba tu limsep m a balunga anu cacay ku nikalikatan tu dingki, saan uyda kuhan nina tusaay a balungaan anu malikat tu uyda kuhan tu sikalalikeluh atu micapiay tu a nikalalikeluhan. i demiad, maadih ita ku sakalecad nu balungaan, nina tusaay a babalungaan malacacay nu sulitan atu micapiay tu nu cacay a mapatelekay nu sulitan, uyni kuhan amihaymaw tu kita a pacuna, u bali, cakep, culi a nikalawaan, hakiya u tangah nu balunga ngyayngay sa ku culil. 50 m . (2) namaka wali atu namaka kawanan tu nikalalikeluhan u miduducay tu culil nu balungaan nina tusaay a muculi sakalalikeluh namaka kawili kawanan idaw ku ancin nu laadan a nikalalikeluhan. patinaku, u tadadadan atu dadan nu teban a sasaay a nipacuna atu miduduc tu nananuman atu dadan nu babalungaan a muculil nu sakaypabawan a nikalikeluhan. saan tu culil nu balunga a picidekan, saan ku mananamay a tademaw. itini nikalalikeluhan nu tasaay a balungaan makayda nami i kawil tu nikalalikeluh, duma ninatusaay a balungaan a nikalalikeluhan makayda i tapiingan. nikasikawawan makakenih tu caculilan nu nanum, malalikeluh tina tusaay a balungaan hina " udip tu a pasayda i kawanan" muculil, sisa nina tusaay a balungaan makayda namin i kawili a malalikeluh. anu sipakayda i kawili atu kawanan malalikelauh. itini i labii, kilul sa tu culil nu balungan a pacuna tu sakalalikeluh, i nu ayawan ku cacay makaadih tu dingki atu sakalecad nu dingkian, anu sipakayda i kawili ku nikalikeluhan, ina tusaay a balungaan kanca makaadih tu dingki atu sumanahay a dinkian, idemiad, makaadih tu sakalecad, u sakalecad ku sakalalikeluhan. (2) .
S.PHON: == kikaj nu bar~…ĺuŇča *** == kikaj a bar~…ĺuŇča u itida i kikur~…ĺ ku saŇča idaw ku kur~…ĺupir~…ĺa mar~…ĺin…ôŇč a ańß…ômawaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, am…ôr~…ĺik ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, satar~…ĺakawaj nu am…ôr~…ĺik ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ** ńßaj-r~…ĺi ka tar~…ĺakaw. ** *** . sakaj niubiajan **** kikaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan u sakaj kar~…ĺawkawan a am…ôr~…ĺikan, sisa ńßina ¶ukajmas ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a tad…ômawan sapiubi nu ńß…ôni a kawawan, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an i nikudan nu kikur~…ĺan mi ¶unus tu s…ôpat r~…ĺima a muota sakakar~…ĺamkan nu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an mikijadańß tu war~…ĺu a muotaan, mańßiniaj ni sumadan a kikaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶i " ta-f…ô. tus…ôps…ôps…ôp ajaw a mińß ¶aan, mi ¶id…ôk i ¶ajsiwsiws…ôp r~…ĺiŇčatu nu mińß ¶aan, sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu miubiaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan ńßina ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i ¶un-kuo tar~…ĺu atu siŇč-kun a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw mi ¶id…ôk ku jadańß. miubiaj a tad…ômaw sipakajda i kikajaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tina tusaaj a kitidaan pitu a sas…ôr~…ĺi ¶an nu tukian. tada tabakitu ku muota, ami ¶a ku nikaam…ôr~…ĺi sawsawni siziku tu, sisa, ami ¶a kaw u miubiaj a ¶a ¶aj, ńßu ¶unu tad…ômaw ¶aaj ka ¶aw tina kikajan a bar~…ĺuŇčaan. mi ¶apitu ajda a mińß ¶aan, tada mar~…ĺar~…ĺuktu ku mikinsaaj sisa mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp ku miubiaj pakaj bar~…ĺuŇčaan, nika mańßiniaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan katukuńß ajda u r~…ĺabuaj nu siŇč-kaŇč a tad…ômaw ku mi ¶ukajmasaj tu niubian, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an u miubiaj a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tad…ômaw mi ¶ukajmas ¶i "ta-f…ôan", namapur~…ĺuŇč tu a mapar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. . kikajaj a bar~…ĺuŇča *** kikajaj a bar~…ĺuŇča , maajmas atu nu sakaj tad…ômawaj a bar~…ĺuŇča, u kikaj ku mitijuŇčaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan. paŇčaŇčan ńßan u " m…ôduk sananaj a bar~…ĺuŇča". miidaaj tu kikajaj nu mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan. k…ônińßan u sir~…ĺańßudaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, sumi a simar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, kadid…ôŇčaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, sumi nu kadid…ôŇčaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, sakaj diŇčkiaj ¶uduńßan a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, mip…ôsaj nu ¶a ¶uduńßan a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, ńß…ô-tun-r~…ĺi bar~…ĺuŇčaan. u simar~…ĺ atu pa ¶ait…ôn nanaj nu adidiaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, ńßina paŇčaŇčanan u " utubajaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan". *** , . imi ** ¶ajsiwpi ¶r~…ĺu mińß ¶aan kanatar~…ĺ i baju nu saka ¶aaj ka r~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß nu kawawan" sakatur~…ĺu " ńßu ¶unu imi" sakatusa nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu dadanan: kikajaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan" a kamuan, u kikaj ku mi ¶uduńßan tu duma a bar~…ĺuŇčaan. sipakajni i " kikajaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan" tunipikajsjakuan, idaw ku sasakamu…ôn tu i sasaaj: "**** : (*) " u kikaj ku sapi ¶uduńß" ja bar~…ĺuŇčan ńßina u kikaj ku sapi ¶uduńß sa. anu idaw ku nipipa ¶umudan tu sapi ¶uduńß tu kikajan atu tan…ôŇč u kikaj ku sapi ¶uduńß, nika ńßatidaaj tu ¶aaj namin kaw u kikaj ku mi ¶uduńßan, ńßakija u ¶aajaj pa ¶umud tu kikaj, ¶aaj kaw nu " kikajaj a bar~…ĺuŇčan". ńßatu ńßatidaaj nu nipa ¶unaan tu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, anu pa ¶umud…ôn tu kikaj anu ¶aaj ¶ukajmasi u "sasir~…ĺud tu" " ńßu ¶unu imian" saan tu " pajajpaj a bar~…ĺuŇčan" u ¶aajaj kaw u kikajaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, ¶aaj kaw u kikajaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan. kanańßatu papa ¶unaan tu pajapaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan u kikaj ku sapi ¶uduńß a kikajan, ¶aaj kaw maajmasaj tu " sasir~…ĺudan" mańßiniaj u " pajapaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan" a imian, tan…ôŇč kita par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan u ńßina ¶uduńßan nanaj tada u kikaj tu ku sapi ¶uduńß, sisa u " kikajaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan". (*) . (*) " kikaj ku sapi ¶uduńß" nipatu ¶…ôkan u kikaj ku sapi ¶uduńß sa, anu u ¶anan ¶anan tu a kikajan. anu u ¶a ¶uduńß…ôn tu a wajwajan u kikaj tu ku sapi ¶uduńß, anu u r~…ĺańßud tu a bar~…ĺunaan, sumi nu kikajan a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, dinki ¶a ¶uduńßan atu ńß…ô-tun-r~…ĺi a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, u "kikajaj namin nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan" ku sausi sa. (*) . (*) " u kikaj ku sapi ¶uduńß" ¶aaj kaw tat…ôŇčaaj u kikaj ku sapi ¶uduńß. anu u kikajtu ku sapi ¶uduńß a wajwajan u kikajtu ku sapi ¶uduńß sa, kanańßatu musar~…ĺuim…ôŇč i minatu ku bar~…ĺuŇča atu masar~…ĺuim…ôŇč ku kikaj i nipi ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, u " kikaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan" namin. (*) . (*) " sir~…ĺudan" sakatur~…ĺu " ńßu ¶unu a imian" sipatatiku tu " mibutiŇčaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, " ¶aajaj kaw kakakuwanan a bar~…ĺuŇča", sasanar~…ĺimaan a sakasiwantan nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, " ti-siw-bar~…ĺuŇča, " nanumaj a ńßikuki Ē~ ° nu imian, mańßiniaj a bar~…ĺuŇča u kikajan nanaj a pa ¶uduńßan ¶aaj kaw u "kikaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, itini i kanatar~…ĺan nu sur~…ĺitan nu "ńßu ¶unu a imian" kajsakuan u masa ¶a ¶ajaj atu masir~…ĺa ¶aj, " u ainanumaj a bar~…ĺuŇčan sa" tat…ôŇčan u " kikajaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan", tat…ôŇčaaj nu imian u " kikaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan". (*)"**" . tasaaj nu kikaj a bar~…ĺuŇčan ***** sakaj "sasir~…ĺudan" saka sabaw s…ôpat a s…ôr~…ĺi ¶, sabaw pitu a s…ôr~…ĺi ¶, sabaw war~…ĺu a s…ôr~…ĺi ¶, sabaw siwa a s…ôr~…ĺi ¶ a nipatu ¶…ôkan, ujni a s…ôr~…ĺi ¶an "tasaaj nu kikkaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan" ¶aaj kaw nida nu kikajaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan atu nu duma a bar~…ĺuŇčaan " sapitupin tu r~…ĺabaŇč nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, ju misaŇča ńß…ônaj tina bar~…ĺuŇčaan, patu ¶…ôkan tu sakaj bajuaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, misas…ôdiwaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan. kanańßatu u kikajaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan atu duma nu s…ôpataj a babar~…ĺuŇčaan ni saŇča " masasuadińß nu papa ¶unaan" a wajwajan, ¶aaj kaw maajmasaj " sasir~…ĺudan" saka ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu imian " sakar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺańß nu papa ¶unaan" a sakatatuŇčus : sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ujni a nipatu ¶…ôkan ¶aaj kaajmas tina s…ôpataj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan a "nika r~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan" nu wajwajan. **"**" . dadan nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan nina tusaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan midudu ¶aj tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan ninatusaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, u nipidudu ¶an tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a makajpabaw atu makaj sasa a bar~…ĺuŇča ńßakija mi ¶a ¶uis tu bar~…ĺuŇča atu midudu ¶aj tu nanum a bar~…ĺuŇča nina tusaaj a babar~…ĺuŇčaan tu nikar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan. pasu i sasaaj a kamu…ôn (*) sikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß atu mi ¶apiajtu a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß ńßi ¶a…ôn a siwatan tina tusaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan atu mi ¶apiaj tu a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan. i r~…ĺabii, ńßu ¶unu ¶a ¶ajaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan i nu ajawan atu mi ¶apiaj tu i nu ajawan, maadińß ku nu ajawan atu nikudanaj a dikian masapat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkaj a sur~…ĺidan atu mi ¶apiaj tu a mapat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkaj a sur~…ĺitan, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad makaadińß tu sumanańßaj , r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a diŇčkian, ja tanaju misaba tu r~…ĺims…ôp m a bar~…ĺuŇča anu ¶a ¶aj ku nikar~…ĺikatan tu diŇčki, saan ujda kuńßan nina tusaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan anu mar~…ĺikat tu ujda kuńßan tu sikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß atu mi ¶apiaj tu a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan. i d…ômiad, maadińß ita ku sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, nina tusaaj a babar~…ĺuŇčaan mar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj nu sur~…ĺitan atu mi ¶apiaj tu nu ¶a ¶aj a mapat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkaj nu sur~…ĺitan, ujni kuńßan amińßajmaw tu kita a pa ¶una, u bar~…ĺi, ¶ak…ôp, ¶ur~…ĺi a nikar~…ĺawaan, ńßakija u taŇčańß nu bar~…ĺuŇča ŇčjajŇčaj sa ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. ** m . (*) namaka war~…ĺi atu namaka kawanan tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan u midudu ¶aj tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan nina tusaaj a mu ¶ur~…ĺi sakar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß namaka kawir~…ĺi kawanan idaw ku an ¶in nu r~…ĺaadan a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan. patinaku, u tadadadan atu dadan nu t…ôban a sasaaj a nipa ¶una atu midudu ¶ tu nananuman atu dadan nu babar~…ĺuŇčaan a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu sakajpabawan a nikar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan. saan tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇča a pi ¶id…ôkan, saan ku mananamaj a tad…ômaw. itini nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan nu tasaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan makajda nami i kawir~…ĺ tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß, duma ninatusaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan makajda i tapiiŇčan. nikasikawawan makak…ônińß tu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu nanum, mar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tina tusaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan ńßina " udip tu a pasajda i kawanan" mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, sisa nina tusaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan makajda namin i kawir~…ĺi a mar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß. anu sipakajda i kawir~…ĺi atu kawanan mar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺauńß. itini i r~…ĺabii, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇčan a pa ¶una tu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß, i nu ajawan ku ¶a ¶aj makaadińß tu diŇčki atu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu diŇčkian, anu sipakajda i kawir~…ĺi ku nikar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan, ina tusaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan kan ¶a makaadińß tu diŇčki atu sumanańßaj a dinkian, id…ômiad, makaadińß tu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, u sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku sakar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan. (*) .
S.FORM: == kikay nu balunga ś©üŚčēŤąĻ == kikay a balunga u itida i kikul ku sanga idaw ku kulupila malineng a ahemaway nu balungaan, amelik ku culil, satalakaway nu amelik han makaala tu 30 hay-li ka talakaw. 33 ś©üŚčēŤąĻ . sakay niubiayan ŤĶįÁßĀÁĒ®ťÄĒ kikay a balungaan u sakay kalawkawan a amelikan, sisa hina cukaymas ku la'cusay a tademawan sapiubi nu heni a kawawan, alahican i nikudan nu kikulan micunus tu sepat lima a muota sakakalamkan nu culil, alahican mikiyadah tu walu a muotaan, mahiniay ni sumadan a kikay nu balungaan pangangan han ci " ta-fey. tusepsepsep ayaw a mihcaan, micidek i caysiwsiwsep lingatu nu mihcaan, saculil nu miubiay a balungaan hinaculil i Cun-kuo talu atu Sing-kun a liwliw micidek ku yadah. miubiay a tademaw sipakayda i kikayay a balungaan, muculil tina tusaay a kitidaan pitu a saselican nu tukian. tada tabakitu ku muota, amica ku nikaameli sawsawni siziku tu, sisa, amica kaw u miubiay a cacay, hucunu tademaw caay kacaw tina kikayan a balungaan. Micapitu ayda a mihcaan, tada malaluktu ku mikinsaay sisa maselep ku miubiay pakay balungaan, nika mahiniay a balungaan katukuh ayda u labuay nu Sing-kang a tademaw ku micukaymasay tu niubian, alahican u miubiay a tahekal nu tademaw micukaymas ci "ta-feyan", namapulung tu a mapalalid nu imelang. . kikayay a balunga ś©üŚčēŤąĻ kikayay a balunga , maaymas atu nu sakay tademaway a balunga, u kikay ku mitiyungay a balungaan. pangangan han u " meduk sananay a balunga". miidaay tu kikayay nu muculilay a balungaan. kenihan u silahuday a balungaan, sumi a simal nu balungaan, kadidengay a balungaan, sumi nu kadidengay a balungaan, sakay dingkiay cuduhan a balungaan, mipesay nu cacuduhan a balungaan, he-tun-li balungaan. u simal atu pacaiten nanay nu adidiay a balungaan, hina panganganan u " utubayay a balungaan". ś©üŚčēŤąĻ , . imi ŚģöÁĺ© caysiwpiclu mihcaan kanatal i bayu nu sakacaay ka lalikeluh nu kawawan" sakatulu " hucunu imi" sakatusa nu ahebalay nu dadanan: kikayay nu balungaan" a kamuan, u kikay ku micuduhan tu duma a balungaan. sipakayni i " kikayay a balungaan" tunipikaysyakuan, idaw ku sasakamuen tu i sasaay: "1972 : (1) " u kikay ku sapicuduh" ya balungan hina u kikay ku sapicuduh sa. anu idaw ku nipipacumudan tu sapicuduh tu kikayan atu taneng u kikay ku sapicuduh, nika hatidaay tu caay namin kaw u kikay ku micuduhan, hakiya u caayay pacumud tu kikay, caay kaw nu " kikayay a balungan". hatu hatidaay nu nipacunaan tu balungaan, anu pacumuden tu kikay anu caay cukaymasi u "sasilud tu" " hucunu imian" saan tu " payaypay a balungan" u caayay kaw u kikayay a balungaan, caay kaw u kikayay nu balungaan. kanahatu papacunaan tu payapay nu balungaan u kikay ku sapicuduh a kikayan, caay kaw maaymasay tu " sasiludan" mahiniay u " payapay nu balungaan" a imian, taneng kita palutatengan u hinacuduhan nanay tada u kikay tu ku sapicuduh, sisa u " kikayay nu balungaan". (1) . (2) " kikay ku sapicuduh" nipatucekan u kikay ku sapicuduh sa, anu u canancanan tu a kikayan. anu u cacuduhen tu a waywayan u kikay tu ku sapicuduh, anu u lahud tu a balunaan, sumi nu kikayan a balungaan, dinki cacuduhan atu he-tun-li a balungaan, u "kikayay namin nu balungaan" ku sausi sa. (2) . (3) " u kikay ku sapicuduh" caay kaw tatengaay u kikay ku sapicuduh. anu u kikaytu ku sapicuduh a waywayan u kikaytu ku sapicuduh sa, kanahatu musaluimeng i minatu ku balunga atu masaluimeng ku kikay i nipiculilan, u " kikay nu balungaan" namin. (3) . (4) " siludan" sakatulu " hucunu a imian" sipatatiku tu " mibutingay a balungaan, " caayay kaw kakakuwanan a balunga", sasanalimaan a sakasiwantan nu balungaan, " ti-siw-balunga, " nanumay a hikuki' nu imian, mahiniay a balunga u kikayan nanay a pacuduhan caay kaw u "kikay nu balungaan, itini i kanatalan nu sulitan nu "hucunu a imian" kaysakuan u masacacayay atu masilacay, " u ainanumay a balungan sa" tatengan u " kikayay nu balungaan", tatengaay nu imian u " kikay nu balungaan". (4)"Ť¶ŹŚČá" . tasaay nu kikay a balungan ŚÖ©ŤČėś©üŚčēŤąĻ sakay "sasiludan" saka sabaw sepat a selic, sabaw pitu a selic, sabaw walu a selic, sabaw siwa a selic a nipatucekan, uyni a selican "tasaay nu kikkay a balungaan" caay kaw nida nu kikayay a balungaan atu nu duma a balungaan " sapitupin tu labang nu balungaan, yu misanga henay tina balungaan, patucekan tu sakay bayuay a balungaan, misasediway nu balungaan. kanahatu u kikayay a balungaan atu duma nu sepatay a babalungaan ni sanga " masasuadih nu papacunaan" a waywayan, caay kaw maaymasay " sasiludan" sakacacay a bataan nu imian " sakalalikelah nu papacunaan" a sakatatungus : sakalecad, uyni a nipatucekan caay kaaymas tina sepatay nu balungaan a "nika lalikeluhan" nu waywayan. ś†Ļśďö"Ť¶ŹŚČá" . dadan nu balungaan nikalalikeluhan nina tusaay a balungaan miduducay tu nikalalikeluhan ninatusaay a balungaan, u nipiduducan tu culil a makaypabaw atu makay sasa a balunga hakiya micacuis tu balunga atu miduducay tu nanum a balunga nina tusaay a babalungaan tu nikalikeluhan. pasu i sasaay a kamuen (1) sikalalikeluh atu micapiaytu a nikalalikeluh hicaen a siwatan tina tusaay a balungaan tu nikalalikeluhan atu micapiay tu a nikalalikeluhan. i labii, hucunu cacayay a balungaan i nu ayawan atu micapiay tu i nu ayawan, maadih ku nu ayawan atu nikudanay a dikian masapatelekay a sulidan atu micapiay tu a mapatelekay a sulitan, malecad makaadih tu sumanahay , langdaway a dingkian, ya tanayu misaba tu limsep m a balunga anu cacay ku nikalikatan tu dingki, saan uyda kuhan nina tusaay a balungaan anu malikat tu uyda kuhan tu sikalalikeluh atu micapiay tu a nikalalikeluhan. i demiad, maadih ita ku sakalecad nu balungaan, nina tusaay a babalungaan malacacay nu sulitan atu micapiay tu nu cacay a mapatelekay nu sulitan, uyni kuhan amihaymaw tu kita a pacuna, u bali, cakep, culi a nikalawaan, hakiya u tangah nu balunga ngyayngay sa ku culil. 50 m . (2) namaka wali atu namaka kawanan tu nikalalikeluhan u miduducay tu culil nu balungaan nina tusaay a muculi sakalalikeluh namaka kawili kawanan idaw ku ancin nu laadan a nikalalikeluhan. patinaku, u tadadadan atu dadan nu teban a sasaay a nipacuna atu miduduc tu nananuman atu dadan nu babalungaan a muculil nu sakaypabawan a nikalikeluhan. saan tu culil nu balunga a picidekan, saan ku mananamay a tademaw. itini nikalalikeluhan nu tasaay a balungaan makayda nami i kawil tu nikalalikeluh, duma ninatusaay a balungaan a nikalalikeluhan makayda i tapiingan. nikasikawawan makakenih tu caculilan nu nanum, malalikeluh tina tusaay a balungaan hina " udip tu a pasayda i kawanan" muculil, sisa nina tusaay a balungaan makayda namin i kawili a malalikeluh. anu sipakayda i kawili atu kawanan malalikelauh. itini i labii, kilul sa tu culil nu balungan a pacuna tu sakalalikeluh, i nu ayawan ku cacay makaadih tu dingki atu sakalecad nu dingkian, anu sipakayda i kawili ku nikalikeluhan, ina tusaay a balungaan kanca makaadih tu dingki atu sumanahay a dinkian, idemiad, makaadih tu sakalecad, u sakalecad ku sakalalikeluhan. (2) .

am…ôr~…ĺik ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ** ńßaj-r~…ĺi ka tar~…ĺakaw. ** *** . sakaj niubiajan **** kikaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan u sakaj kar~…ĺawkawan a am…ôr~…ĺikan, sisa ńßina ¶ukajmas ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a tad…ômawan sapiubi nu ńß…ôni a kawawan, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an i nikudan nu kikur~…ĺan mi ¶unus tu s…ôpat r~…ĺima a muota sakakar~…ĺamkan nu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an mikijadańß tu war~…ĺu a muotaan, mańßiniaj ni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i ¶un-kuo tar~…ĺu atu siŇč-kun a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw mi ¶id…ôk ku jadańß. miubiaj a tad…ômaw sipakajda i kikajaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tina tusaaj a kitidaan pitu a sas…ôr~…ĺi ¶an nu tukian. tada tabakitu ku muota, ami ¶a ku nikaam…ôr~…ĺi sawsawni siziku tu, sisa, ami ¶a kaw u miubiaj a ¶a ¶aj, ńßu ¶unu tad…ômaw ¶aaj ka ¶aw tina kikajan a bar~…ĺuŇčaan. mi ¶apitu ajda a mińß ¶aan, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an u miubiaj a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tad…ômaw mi ¶ukajmas ¶i "ta-f…ôan", namapur~…ĺuŇč tu a mapar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. . kikajaj a bar~…ĺuŇča *** kikajaj a bar~…ĺuŇča , maajmas atu nu sakaj bar~…ĺuŇčaan, sumi a simar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, kadid…ôŇčaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, sumi nu kadid…ôŇčaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, sakaj diŇčkiaj ¶uduńßan a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, mip…ôsaj nu ¶a ¶uduńßan a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, saka ¶aaj ka r~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß nu kawawan" sakatur~…ĺu " ńßu ¶unu imi" sakatusa nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu dadanan: kikajaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan" a kamuan, u kikaj ku mi ¶uduńßan tu duma a bar~…ĺuŇčaan. sipakajni i " kikajaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan" tunipikajsjakuan, idaw ku sasakamu…ôn tu i sasaaj: "**** : (*) " u kikaj ku sapi ¶uduńß" ja bar~…ĺuŇčan ńßina u kikaj ku sapi ¶uduńß sa. anu idaw ku nipipa ¶umudan tu sapi ¶uduńß tu kikajan atu tan…ôŇč u kikaj ku sapi ¶uduńß, nika ńßatidaaj tu ¶aaj namin kaw u kikaj ku mi ¶uduńßan, ńßakija u ¶aajaj pa ¶umud tu kikaj, ¶aaj kaw nu " kikajaj a bar~…ĺuŇčan". ńßatu ńßatidaaj nu nipa ¶unaan tu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, anu pa ¶umud…ôn tu kikaj anu ¶aaj ¶ukajmasi u "sasir~…ĺud tu" " ńßu ¶unu imian" saan tu " pajajpaj a bar~…ĺuŇčan" u ¶aajaj kaw u kikajaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, ¶aaj kaw u kikajaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan. kanańßatu papa ¶unaan tu pajapaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan u kikaj ku sapi ¶uduńß a kikajan, ¶aaj kaw maajmasaj tu " sasir~…ĺudan" mańßiniaj u " pajapaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan" a imian, tan…ôŇč kita par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan u ńßina ¶uduńßan nanaj tada u kikaj tu ku sapi ¶uduńß, sisa u " kikajaj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan". (*) . (*) " kikaj ku sapi ¶uduńß" nipatu ¶…ôkan u kikaj ku sapi ¶uduńß sa, anu u ¶anan ¶anan tu a kikajan. anu u ¶a ¶uduńß…ôn tu a wajwajan u kikaj tu ku sapi ¶uduńß, anu u r~…ĺańßud tu a bar~…ĺunaan, sumi nu kikajan a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, dinki ¶a ¶uduńßan atu ńß…ô-tun-r~…ĺi a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, u "kikajaj namin nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan" ku sausi sa. (*) . (*) . s…ôr~…ĺi ¶an "tasaaj nu kikkaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan" ¶aaj kaw nida nu kikajaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan atu nu duma a bar~…ĺuŇčaan " sapitupin tu r~…ĺabaŇč nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, ju misaŇča ńß…ônaj tina bar~…ĺuŇčaan, patu kaw maajmasaj " sasir~…ĺudan" saka ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu imian " sakar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺańß nu papa ¶unaan" a sakatatuŇčus : sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ujni a nipatu ¶…ôkan ¶aaj kaajmas tina s…ôpataj nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan a "nika r~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan" nu wajwajan. **"**" . dadan nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan nina tusaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan midudu ¶aj tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan ninatusaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan, u nipidudu ¶an tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a makajpabaw atu makaj sasa a bar~…ĺuŇča ńßakija mi ¶a ¶uis tu bar~…ĺuŇča atu midudu ¶aj tu nanum a bar~…ĺuŇča nina tusaaj a babar~…ĺuŇčaan tu nikar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan. pasu i sasaaj a kamu…ôn (*) sikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß atu mi ¶apiajtu a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß ńßi ¶a…ôn a siwatan tina tusaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan atu mi ¶apiaj tu a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan. i r~…ĺabii, ńßu ¶unu ¶a ¶ajaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan i nu ajawan atu mi ¶apiaj tu i nu ajawan, maadińß ku nu ajawan atu nikudanaj a dikian masapat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkaj a sur~…ĺidan atu mi ¶apiaj tu a mapat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkaj a sur~…ĺitan, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad makaadińß tu sumanańßaj , r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a diŇčkian, ja tanaju misaba tu r~…ĺims…ôp m a bar~…ĺuŇča anu ¶a ¶aj ku nikar~…ĺikatan tu diŇčki, saan bar~…ĺuŇčaan, nina tusaaj a babar~…ĺuŇčaan mar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj nu sur~…ĺitan atu mi ¶apiaj tu nu ¶a ¶aj a mapat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkaj nu sur~…ĺitan, ujni kuńßan amińßajmaw tu kita a pa ¶una, u bar~…ĺi, ¶ak…ôp, ¶ur~…ĺi a nikar~…ĺawaan, ńßakija u taŇčańß nu bar~…ĺuŇča ŇčjajŇčaj sa ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. ** m . (*) namaka war~…ĺi atu namaka kawanan tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan u midudu ¶aj tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan nina tusaaj a mu ¶ur~…ĺi sakar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß namaka kawir~…ĺi kawanan idaw ku an ¶in nu r~…ĺaadan a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan. patinaku, u tadadadan atu dadan nu t…ôban a sasaaj a nipa ¶una atu midudu ¶ tu nananuman atu dadan nu babar~…ĺuŇčaan a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu sakajpabawan a nikar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan. saan tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇča a pi ¶id…ôkan, saan ku mananamaj a tad…ômaw. itini nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan nu tasaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan makajda nami i kawir~…ĺ tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß, duma ninatusaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan a nikar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan makajda i tapiiŇčan. nikasikawawan makak…ônińß tu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu nanum, mar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tina tusaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan ńßina " udip tu a pasajda i kawanan" mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, sisa nina tusaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan makajda namin i kawir~…ĺi a mar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß. anu sipakajda i kawir~…ĺi atu kawanan mar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺauńß. itini i r~…ĺabii, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuŇčan a pa ¶una tu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß, i nu ajawan ku ¶a ¶aj makaadińß tu diŇčki atu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu diŇčkian, anu sipakajda i kawir~…ĺi ku nikar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan, ina tusaaj a bar~…ĺuŇčaan kan ¶a makaadińß tu diŇčki atu sumanańßaj a dinkian, id…ômiad, makaadińß tu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, u sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku sakar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan. (*) .
